crime.quote: People are turning up missing. It is my job to find out what is happening to them.

victim.value: Young women/girls who 'waste their childhood' according to perpetrator's twisted worldview
victim.quote: I had a bad childhood and they are wasting theirs.

closed_world.value: New York city area with focus on specific locations like the station, club, and abandoned factory
closed_world.quote: This is just what a typical day in New York looks like for me.

culprit_and_motive.value: Cole Crooni, motivated by trauma from his sister's death and belief that girls are wasting their lives
culprit_and_motive.quote: I had a bad childhood and they are wasting theirs.

resolution.value: Detective talks down the kidnapper through empathy rather than force or investigation
resolution.quote: I'm going to let you out. Promise not to run to the police even though you are the police?

investigator.value: Samantha Vernandez, professional detective investigating the missing persons cases
investigator.quote: People are turning up missing. It is my job to find out what is happening to them.

suspect_architecture.value: Single perpetrator Cole Crooni revealed early, no traditional suspect pool with differentiated motives - architectural weakness
suspect_architecture.quote: Cole Crooni. What is yours? I'm surprised my sister didn't tell you. My name is Samantha Vernandez.

clue_fairness.value: Mixed fairness - witness description provided to reader, but kidnapper's identity and backstory revealed through direct confession
clue_fairness.quote: He has medium long dark brown hair with a dark magenta streak, blue eyes with green tints, and a tan complexion.

social_world.value: Police institutional structure with detective protagonist, but minimal exploration of power dynamics or hierarchies
social_world.quote: So far the police are trying to keep it quiet, but the missing people's families are getting worried.

reveal_mechanic.value: Direct confession from perpetrator explaining childhood trauma and sister's death as motivation for kidnapping girls
reveal_mechanic.quote: I wish I could go back in time so that I wouldn't snap at the teacher like I did.

media_and_audience.value: Police attempting to keep disappearances quiet to avoid public panic and interference with investigation
media_and_audience.quote: So far the police are trying to keep it quiet, but the missing people's families are getting worried.

investigator_wound.value: Detective's protective relationship with twin sister creates personal stakes when sister becomes involved in case
investigator_wound.quote: I wonder why she have to get involved with it. I always have protected her from everything. She is my twin.

_meta.title: ebook nikki miller death to all
